name: pdf-fusion-smart-pro
description: Browser-first PDF toolkit with Verify System v12 BIG UPDATE: server-signed registry, trust score, batch verify, bulk register, hash lookup, history timeline, suspend/revoke/restore/expiry, admin diagnostics, PWA, OCR and PDF utilities.

scripts.check:js: npm run check:api && npm run check:assets
scripts.verify:health:local: node -e "const h=require('./api/verify.js'); const req={method:'GET',url:'/api/verify?action=health',headers:{},socket:{}}; const res={setHeader(){},end(x){console.log(x)},set statusCode(v){this._s=v},get statusCode(){return this._s}}; h(req,res)"
